title: Welcome to BNETDocs
brief_html: BNETDocs is now available as a static site on GitHub Pages, preserving years of Battle.net protocol documentation for the community.
content_html:
We are excited to announce that BNETDocs is now hosted as a static site on GitHub Pages. This transition preserves the community's years of hard work documenting the proprietary network protocols used by Blizzard Entertainment's Battle.net platform.

What's included

  • Packet documentation for BNCS, MCP, D2GS, W3GS, BNLS, and more
  • General protocol documents and guides
  • Full-text search powered by Pagefind
  • Open source — contributions welcome on GitHub

The source data is exported from the original dynamic BNETDocs database and rebuilt into a fully static site on each update.
